creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Mine starts fine without this, but I suppose I'm not using the reporting module.

I do not believe the MacOS phantomjs download is appropriate. It ships a phantomjs binary that cannot work on FreeBSD. The correct solution might be to make kibana6 depend on the FreeBSD phantomjs package, but it's unclear if Kibana will accept a system-installed phantomjs or not.
